steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The claim directly states that people usually spend more time viewing art in a museum than online. To support this, we need evidence showing a time difference between these two viewing contexts.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly provides the specific time comparison: three minutes at the museum versus one minute online.

The other three choices discuss unrelated topics—whether other works are online, where visitors come from, and museum collection scope—none of which show a difference in viewing time.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
